docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIRCHER, VINCENT AS TO DEFENDANT HERRING, KEVIN SUMMONS ISSUED
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT HERRING, KEVIN
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERRING, KEVIN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1272 MARKET ST, #402, S.F., LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT OF EXECUTION STAYED TILL NOV. 11, 1997. NO FURTHER STAYS. MUTUAL WAIVER OF CLAIMS INCLUDING 1542CC. DEFT IS SOLE OCCUPANT. PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED. IF DEFT PAYS $1,497- BY 4PM 11/11/97 (CASHIER'S CHECK) NO EVICTION AND JUDGMENT WILL BE VACATED BY PLTF.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: BERENSTEIN, SIDNEY SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR KIRCHER, VINCENT
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIRCHER, VINCENT COURT TRIAL SET FOR OCT-29-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
